title: Author a feature for the offline/online store
description: The end-to-end path from raw source to a materialized, point-in-time-correct, dual-served feature.
body: Use when adding a new feature that training and serving will both consume. Do not ship a feature that only materializes offline — serving will lack it or compute it differently. Actions: declare the entity and source, write the single transform, configure offline materialization and online sync, then replay an entity through both and diff. Validation signals include matching offline/online values for a replayed key and a point-in-time backfill that respects label timing. Risk boundary: a partially materialized feature causes serving-time nulls or skew; if online sync lags, escalate before the feature gates a production model.
